## Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Connector
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance

## Verification

- [ ] `make verify`
- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make docs-check`
- [ ] `make wheel`
- [ ] Connector integration evidence attached, if connector behavior changed.
- [ ] UI screenshots or Playwright evidence attached, if UI changed.

If any required check was skipped, explain why:

## Release Notes

- [ ] User-facing change documented in `CHANGELOG.md` or not needed.
- [ ] Docs updated or not needed.
- [ ] Connector maturity/status updated or not applicable.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private customer data, local `.env` values, or internal planning notes are included.
- [ ] Database migrations are included and reviewed, if models changed.
- [ ] Write/approval/audit behavior is covered, if write behavior changed.
